business_ideas.idea: Photo P clone for other Adobe products: After Effects, Illustrator, full suite alternatives
Photo P equivalent for expensive niche software: Matlab, Autocad, specialized engineering tools
Pay-as-you-go financing for general contractors and service professionals
Affirm competitor with different focus: contractor payments, service industry

predictions.text: Free or freemium alternatives to expensive enterprise software will continue capturing markets
Pay-as-you-go will expand beyond e-commerce into B2B services and contractor payments
